Synthetic data created in setup_task.sh with intentionally fabricated errors
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh comment line 13: 'Note: RXN-001, RXN-004, and RXN-007 have intentionally incorrect reported yields'

privileged_info_summary: The task is based on synthetic reaction data with 8 reactions. Three reactions (RXN-001, RXN-004, RXN-007) have intentionally incorrect reported yields. All chemical calculations using the formula (actual/theoretical)×100 are correct and verified: RXN-001 calculates to 78.85% (reported 82.5%, discrepancy 3.65 pp), RXN-002 to 94.74% (reported 94.7%, discrepancy 0.037 pp), RXN-003 to 80.0% (reported 80.0%, exact match), RXN-004 to 80.49% (reported 79.5%, discrepancy 0.99 pp), RXN-005 to 93.15% (reported 93.2%, discrepancy 0.049 pp), RXN-006 to 82.76% (reported 82.8%, discrepancy 0.041 pp), RXN-007 to 85.96% (reported 85.0%, discrepancy 0.96 pp), and RXN-008 to 84.44% (reported 84.4%, discrepancy 0.044 pp). The verifier uses a 0.1% tolerance for calculations and 0.5 pp threshold for error detection. Pass threshold is 80% (4 of 5 verification criteria).
